blocks.text: NOTES TO THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS CONTINUED
The following table illustrates the number and weighted average share price (“WASP”) on date of award of, and movements in, non-vested restricted shares in the year:
Number 000’s WASP $ cents Number 000’s WASP $ cents
Outstanding at the start of the year 64 155.75 127 155.75
Outstanding at the end of the year – – 64 155.75
The following table illustrates the number and WASP on date of award, and movements in, restricted share units (“RSUs”) and cash-based awards granted under the 2015 LTIP:
Number 000’s WASP £ pence Number 000’s WASP £ pence
Outstanding at the start of the year 14,840 316.09 15,350 215.92
Outstanding at the end of the year 15,346 401.27 14,840 316.09
RSUs and cash-based awards have a vesting period between two to five years, with no award vesting within the first 12 months of the grant.
The following table illustrates the number and WASP on date of award, and movements in, performance share units (“PSUs”) granted under the 2015 LTIP:
Number 000’s WASP £ pence Number 000’s WASP £ pence
Outstanding at the start of the year 7,546 269.65 6,024 219.41
Outstanding at the end of the year 4,084 295.41 7,546 269.65

PSUs vest on one vesting date following a three year vesting period which will comprise three financial years. The awards are divided into three equal parts which will each be subject to a separate annual performance condition linked to the financial performance of the Group.
